chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D- 12 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 47/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025 Mr. Ali Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Akhter, Advocate for Pakistan Railways. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, DAG. ************ Compliance report along with original cheque No. P-337863 dated 13.05.2025 amounting to Rs.2,886,690/- (Two Million Eight Hundred Eighty Six Thousand Six Hundred Ninety Only) has been furnished by Mr. Ghulam Abbass Akhter counsel for Pakistan Railways. Original cheque is handed over to petitioner present in Court after proper acknowledgement and receipt. Counsel for the petitioner submits that now the entire amount has been paid to petitioner and nothing is outstanding to be paid by the department, therefore the official respondents may be restrained from taking any action against the petitioner for vacating the quarter for three months. Order accordingly. The petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA 2
